verse_text: Also command the people, saying, 'You are about to pass through the boundaries of your brethren, the sons of Esau, who live in Seir; and they will be afraid of you and will be in exceeding dread of you.

links.context: Mount Seir is Edom (v. 15), where Esau, brother of Jacob, settled ([[GEN.36:8]]). See [[DEU.2:1]]-6 and note.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
